nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 西米沙鄢
nodes.summary: 西米沙鄢是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Visayan tailorbird等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mount Talinis
nodes.summary: Mount Talinis是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Flame-templed babbler等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Visayan cuckooshrike
nodes.summary: Visayan cuckooshrike（Visayan cuckooshrike，学名 Coracina panayensis），已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: Central Panay Mountain Range
nodes.summary: Central Panay Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Maroon-naped sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lownland and montane forests up to 2,000 meters above sea level

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
